folio.label: 69r
folio.l: Vp on his fleessú , while that I am his wyf
I haue the power , duryng al my lyf
Vp on his ¸pre body , and nat he
Rigút thus the Apostel , told it vn to me
And bad oure husbondes , for to loue vs wele
Al this sentence , me liketú euäydele
¢ Vp stirte the Pardoner , and that a noon
Now Dame q¶ he , by god & by Seynt Ioún
ñe ben a noble prechour , in this caas
I was a boute to wedde a wyf , Allas
What shulde I bye it , on my flessú so deere
ñet had I leuere , wedde noon to ©ere
A byde q¶ she , my tale is nat bygonne
Nay æè shalt drynken , of a nother tonne
Er that I go , shal sauer wers than Ale
Whan that I haue told the , fortú my tale
Of tribulacione , that is in mariage
Of whicú I am expert , in al myn age
This is to seyn , my self hatú ben the whippe
Than maist æè chese , whider æ thow wylt skippe
Of thilke Tonne , that I wyl a broche
By war of it , or æè to ny approche
For I shal telle ensaumples , moo than ten
Who so that nyl , be war , by othere men
By hi~ shuln~ othere men , corrected be
Theise same wordes , wrytetú Protholomee
Rede in his Almagest , and take it there
Dame I wold preye ©ow , if ©oure wyl were
Seide this Pardoner , as ©e bygan
Telletú fortú ©oure tale , & sparetú for noman
And techetú vs ©onge men , of ©oure practike
Gladly q¶ she , syn that it may ©ow lyke
But that I praye , to alle this companye
If that I speke , after my fantasye
As taketú it nougút a gref , of that I seye
For myn entent is nat , but for to pleye
Now sires than shal I , tellen ©ow fortú my tale
As euäe mot I , drynken wyn or Ale
I shal seye sotú , the husbondes that I had
As thre of hem weren goode , & twoo weren bad
The thre of hem weren goode, and riche & olde
Vn ethe mygúten they , the statut holde
In whicú that they were bounden , vn to me
ñe wot wel what I mene , of this ¹dee
